description: Style NoteCrafted from soft cotton and designed with cuts that offer a flattering silhouette, this shirt from highlander is sure to become a wardrobe favourite. Pair it with jeans, throw over a blazer and slip into suede boots or sneakers for your weekend getaway.Product DetailsBlue shirt with white and yellow checks, has full sleeves with buttoned cuffs, spread collar, front buttoned placket on bias, patch pocket on the left chest with embroidery, yoke at back, last buttonhole in orange,triple needle top stitch detail in yellow and blue, brand patch on button placket and a curved hemMaterial and Care100% CottonMachine wash warmWarm ironSize and FitRegular FitThe model (height 6' and shoulder 18") is wearing a size M
